/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libqmmp.so.2 -o libqmmp.so.2.3.1 CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/libqmmp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/visual.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/recycler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/outputwriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/trackinfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/fft.c.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/equ/iir.c.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/equ/iir_cfs.c.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/equ/iir_fpu.c.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/soundcore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/effect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/qmmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/statehandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/volumehandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/metadatamodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/tagmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/qmmpaudioengine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/abstractengine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/audioparameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/inputsource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/fileinputsource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/emptyinputsource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/metadatamanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/replaygain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/qmmpsettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/audioconverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/eqsettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/qmmpevents.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/qmmpplugincache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/channelmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/channelconverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/volume.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/dithering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/visualbuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/cueparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libqmmp.dir/qmmptextcodec.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib: /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.5.3 -pthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
